---
title: "proportional-baseline-holdout"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(rsample)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
```

# Parameters

```{r}
wd <- "/Volumes/DEBIAS"
repo_root <- "/Users/carmen/Documents/github/de-bias/bias-detection"

dfd <- "mapp2"  # twitter, fb_tts, fb_stt, mapp1, mapp2
train_sample_prop <- 0.7
set.seed(123)

output_tag <- "_lad_holdout_proportional_baseline"
```

# Helpers

```{r}
get_bias_path <- function(dfd, wd) {
  if (dfd == "twitter") {
    file.path(wd, "data/outputs/twitter/monthly/populations/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")
  } else if (dfd == "fb_tts") {
    file.path(wd, "data/outputs/fb/census-month/populations/tts/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")
  } else if (dfd == "fb_stt") {
    file.path(wd, "data/outputs/fb/census-month/populations/stt/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")
  } else if (dfd == "mapp1") {
    file.path(wd, "data/outputs/mapp1/census-month/populations/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")
  } else if (dfd == "mapp2") {
    file.path(wd, "data/outputs/mapp2/census-month/populations/active-population-bias/active_population_bias_lad.csv")
  } else {
    stop("Unknown dfd value: ", dfd)
  }
}

safe_cor <- function(x, y, method) {
  if (length(x) < 2 || length(y) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  if (!all(is.finite(x)) || !all(is.finite(y))) return(NA_real_)
  if (sd(x) == 0 || sd(y) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  stats::cor(x, y, method = method)
}
```

# Data

```{r}
prelim_output_dir <- file.path(repo_root, "outputs/preliminary", dfd, "explain-bias")
dir.create(prelim_output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

df_bias <- read.csv(get_bias_path(dfd, wd)) %>%
  rename(geography.code = code) %>%
  filter(is.finite(pop), is.finite(pop_dfd), is.finite(bias))

if ("name" %in% names(df_bias) && dfd %in% c("twitter", "mapp1")) {
  df_bias <- df_bias %>% filter(name != "City of London")
}
```

```{r}
lda_sdf <- st_read(
  file.path(wd, "data/inputs/geographies/boundaries/LAD_Dec_2021_GB_BFC_2022_simplified.gpkg"),
  quiet = TRUE
)

boundary_code_col <- if ("code" %in% names(lda_sdf)) {
  "code"
} else {
  grep("CD$", names(lda_sdf), value = TRUE)[1]
}

if (is.na(boundary_code_col)) {
  stop("Could not detect boundary code column in LAD boundary file.")
}

lda_sdf <- lda_sdf %>%
  rename(code = all_of(boundary_code_col)) %>%
  filter(!grepl("^[SN]", code))

nb_q <- spdep::poly2nb(lda_sdf, queen = TRUE)
```

# Holdout split

```{r}
split_df <- initial_split(df_bias, prop = train_sample_prop)
train_sample <- training(split_df)
test_sample <- testing(split_df)
```

# Fit proportional baseline

```{r}
baseline_fit <- lm(pop_dfd ~ 0 + pop, data = train_sample)

alpha_hat <- unname(coef(baseline_fit)["pop"])
alpha_ci <- confint(baseline_fit, "pop", level = 0.95)
predicted_bias <- 1 - alpha_hat

train_sample$bias_prediction <- predicted_bias
test_sample$bias_prediction <- predicted_bias
```

# Performance

```{r}
train_sample_rmse <- sqrt(mean((train_sample$bias - train_sample$bias_prediction)^2))
train_sample_pearson_cor <- safe_cor(train_sample$bias, train_sample$bias_prediction, method = "pearson")
train_sample_spearman_cor <- safe_cor(train_sample$bias, train_sample$bias_prediction, method = "spearman")
train_sample_sd_error <- sd(train_sample$bias - train_sample$bias_prediction)

test_sample_rmse <- sqrt(mean((test_sample$bias - test_sample$bias_prediction)^2))
test_sample_pearson_cor <- safe_cor(test_sample$bias, test_sample$bias_prediction, method = "pearson")
test_sample_spearman_cor <- safe_cor(test_sample$bias, test_sample$bias_prediction, method = "spearman")
test_sample_sd_error <- sd(test_sample$bias - test_sample$bias_prediction)
```

```{r}
summary_table <- tibble::tibble(
  metric = c("rmse", "pearson", "spearman", "standard_dev"),
  train = c(train_sample_rmse, train_sample_pearson_cor, train_sample_spearman_cor, train_sample_sd_error),
  test = c(test_sample_rmse, test_sample_pearson_cor, test_sample_spearman_cor, test_sample_sd_error),
  data_source = dfd
) %>%
  mutate(
    train = round(train, 3),
    test = round(test, 3)
  )

write_csv(
  summary_table,
  file.path(prelim_output_dir, paste0("model-performance", output_tag, ".csv"))
)

summary_table
```

# Residual Moran's I

```{r}
test_sample$model_residual <- test_sample$bias - test_sample$bias_prediction

resid_aligned <- lda_sdf %>%
  st_set_geometry(NULL) %>%
  transmute(geography.code = code) %>%
  left_join(
    test_sample %>% select(geography.code, model_residual),
    by = "geography.code"
  )

keep <- is.finite(resid_aligned$model_residual)
nb_sub <- spdep::subset.nb(nb_q, subset = keep)
lw_sub <- spdep::nb2listw(nb_sub, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
x_sub <- resid_aligned$model_residual[keep]

resid_moran <- spdep::moran.mc(
  x = x_sub,
  listw = lw_sub,
  nsim = 999,
  zero.policy = TRUE
)

model_residual_moran <- tibble::tibble(
  data_source = dfd,
  moran_i_residuals = as.numeric(resid_moran$statistic),
  p_value_residuals = resid_moran$p.value
)

write_csv(
  model_residual_moran,
  file.path(prelim_output_dir, paste0("model-residual-moran", output_tag, ".csv"))
)

model_residual_moran
```

# Baseline parameters

```{r}
baseline_parameters <- tibble::tibble(
  data_source = dfd,
  alpha_hat = alpha_hat,
  alpha_ci_lower = alpha_ci[1],
  alpha_ci_upper = alpha_ci[2],
  predicted_bias = predicted_bias,
  n_train = nrow(train_sample),
  n_test = nrow(test_sample)
)

write_csv(
  baseline_parameters,
  file.path(prelim_output_dir, paste0("proportional-baseline-parameters", output_tag, ".csv"))
)

baseline_parameters
```
